label: Create Policy
description: Create an access/usage policy definition in the connector.

params.name: permissions
params.description: ODRL permission rules: array of { action, constraints: [{ leftOperand, operator, rightOperand }] }

params.name: prohibitions
params.description: ODRL prohibition rules: array of { action, constraints: [{ leftOperand, operator, rightOperand }] }

params.name: obligations
params.description: ODRL obligation rules: array of { action, constraints: [{ leftOperand, operator, rightOperand }] }
